name: fact-checker
description: Automated fact-checking skill with structured checklist mode. Extracts verifiable claims and citations from documents (Markdown, PDF, DOCX), verifies them via web search and Puppeteer headless browser across 7 verification dimensions (link validity, content matching, citation granularity, numeric accuracy, fact/speculation distinction, source reliability, cross-section consistency), and generates a comprehensive Markdown fact-check report.
